MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-15-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. LYNNE STOCKER AND CATHERINE GOLDEN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. AFTER FINDING GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/23/14 IS CONTINUED TO 11/3/14 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. MISS STOCKER REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NO OBJECTION ON KEEPING THE DISCOVERY OPEN. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
